# Repotoire

> Graph-powered code intelligence with 106 pure Rust detectors.

Repotoire analyzes codebases using knowledge graphs (petgraph + tree-sitter) to detect code smells, security issues, architectural problems, and technical debt that traditional linters miss. Single binary, 9 languages, no external dependencies.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.repotoire.com) — Product overview and getting started
- [Features](https://www.repotoire.com/features) — 106 detectors across security, architecture, code quality
- [How It Works](https://www.repotoire.com/how-it-works) — Graph-powered analysis pipeline
- [Pricing](https://www.repotoire.com/pricing) — Free CLI, paid dashboard plans
- [About](https://www.repotoire.com/about) — Team and mission

## Technical Details

- Language: Rust (93k+ lines)
- Graph Engine: petgraph (in-memory) + redb (persistence)
- Parsers: 9 tree-sitter parsers (Python, TypeScript/JS, Rust, Go, Java, C#, C, C++)
- Detectors: 106 pure Rust (73 default + 33 deep-scan)
- Scoring: Three-pillar (Structure 40%, Quality 30%, Architecture 30%)
- Output: Text, JSON, HTML, SARIF 2.1.0, Markdown
- Install: cargo install, brew, npm, GitHub Action
